title: desmodium heterocarpon subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Desmodium heterocarpon subsp. ovalifolium, also known as oval-leaved tick trefoil, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, gout, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Desmodium heterocarpon subsp. ovalifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
